comment.body:
second, they are well-diversified. 
in the 70s they made a petrodollar deal. SA sell oil to CN in yuan, and they buy gold heavily from Switzerland. While they simultanously keep their currency pegged to USD, and hold most of their wealth in USD and treassuries (they won't commit financial suicide)

comment.body:
I just read Alma new post regarding the geo politic.
At least I can say her thoughts about how the east think is accurate.
I grew up in Asia but luckily was educated in the west. 
My grandfather fought against Americans but ironically I made long lasting friend relationship with many American military families until today. 
So speaking from personal experience, her saying about dragging the long war is an east mentality is correct imo. 
The iran situation now is similar to what happened 50 years ago: middle of a negotiation, and the Us initiated bombing: same tactics. I think the stake is high atm. 
Also Alma’s saying about Americans wanting a stable government in the east is also true.
I’m speaking based on personal knowledge and experience
